title: Strong Chinese imports fails to excite markets
section_path: Strong Chinese imports fails to excite markets
section_path_text: Strong Chinese imports fails to excite markets
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Markets were mixed as weak economic data was offset by supportive fundamentals. A stronger USD was a headwind for investor appetite. Image reference: 1694124613755.png | assets/2023-09-08_strong-chinese-imports-fails-to-excite-markets_img_1694124613755_e3cf2c78f568.png
Copper fell after inventories on the London Metals Exchange rose the most in two years.
